imaging_request.indication_text: Surveillance CT chest 5 months post-VATS left upper lobectomy for stage IIA NSCLC. Patient completing adjuvant carboplatin/paclitaxel.

clinical_indication.diagnosis_text: Malignant neoplasm of upper lobe, left bronchus
clinical_indication.supporting_notes: Pathologic staging pT2bN1M0, Stage IIA. VATS lobectomy 2025-11-12. Adjuvant carboplatin/paclitaxel cycle 3 of 4 in progress. Oncology requests routine 6-month surveillance per NCCN.
